problem: Why do all animals sleep — what is the essential biological function?
hypothesis: If Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation is applied to essential, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: EEG/MEG signal analysis with 21 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
